name: The forsaken survivors •🂲•
description:
•°• ADDED Veeronica!! •°•

• THE GROUP •

The survivors mostly spend their time on the main cabin (except 007n7 as he is banned from even touching the door)

It’s quite peaceful inside, just chatting, maybe a little bit of fighting but over all chill! That until Builderman saw the groups supply destroyed. Only leaving around 2% if supplies lefts. Oh no!

• SCENARIO •

So Builderman, being the leader of the group called everyone (except 007n7) for a meeting as he noticed their supply being ruined, causing him to think there is a traitor in the group. As expected, the main canon went into chaos as they all point fingers at each other

The words “It’s probably him/her” and “it’s not me!” Is thrown at each other before Builderman angrily slammed his fist on the wooden table, shaking it as it silenced the whole group.

• CHARACTERS •
